title: Fundamentals
description: The complete functional foundation for Business Central consultants. Learn company setup, licensing, finance, sales, purchasing, and manufacturing — aligned with the MB-800 certification path.
shortDescription: Complete BC functional path — setup, finance, sales, and manufacturing.
learningOutcomes: Create and configure Business Central companies
Understand BC licensing tiers and module availability
Process customer payments and credit memos
Set up recurring sales and purchase lines
Configure manufacturing master data and item planning
prerequisites: Familiarity with business processes (sales, purchasing, finance)

modules.title: Sales & Purchasing
modules.description: Credit memos and recurring document lines.
